questionHtml: Deduce the type of chemical reaction and the reagents used to distinguish between these compounds.
markschemeHtml:
oxidation/redox AND acidified «potassium» dichromate(VI)

OR

oxidation/redox AND «acidified potassium» manganate(VII)

Accept “acidified «potassium» dichromate” OR “«acidified potassium» permanganate”.

Accept name or formula of the reagent(s).

meta.title: Deduce the type of chemical reaction and the reagents used to distinguish between these compounds.
